text:
Once upon a time in the quirky town of Charming Corner, there lived a peculiar old janitor named Jolly Jim. Jim had a love for juggling cats — yes, cats. They climbed onto his shoulders all the time. His favorite cat was Whiskers. Even his mop was named Whiskers.

One sunny morning, after cleaning every nook and cranny and juggling several cat toys, Jim heard unusual music. He peeked out his window to investigate. There stood a gnome, dancing circles around a wishing well. Jim sat silently and started to dance along.

The gnome was delighted. “Well, hello there, jolly jumper!” he chuckled. Jim told him that every wish he made came true. The gnome began singing a cheerful tune and throwing glitter.

Jim wished for a pet parrot. Sure enough, a bright yellow parrot landed on his shoulder. It squawked happily.

Jim danced around the town singing about his new feathered friend. Word spread
